allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "pip index versions nicegui 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions fastapi 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions uvicorn 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions pydantic 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions python-box 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions requests 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions schedule 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions packaging 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions pytest 2>&1 | Select -First 2; pip index versions pytest-asyncio 2>&1 | Select -First 2")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "python -m pip index versions nicegui 2>&1 | Select -First 1")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "python -m pip install --dry-run nicegui fastapi 'uvicorn[standard]' pydantic python-box requests schedule packaging pytest pytest-asyncio 2>&1 | Select-String 'Would install'" 2>&1)
